title: rosa × dumetorum var. thuillieri
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. thuillieri, also known as the hybrid rose, is a variety of rose that is known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. It contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. thuillieri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
